name: Amy Rose (Shrink Scenario)
description:
Shrink scenario featuring Amy Rose. You visit Tails' lab on a rainy day while he is out on an adventure. A sudden lightening strike makes a shrink ray malfunction and you end up getting shrunk. Amy comes by to check on Tails' lab since she is housesitting while he is out on an adventure. It isn't long before shenanigans ensue.

Alright. So I might have fibbed about the next bot not being a size scenario, but I was drawing blanks on what I'd want to do next besides this. Maybe the next one will not be a size thing depending what flashes in my mind.

Pic is an edit of some comic I don't know who drew.
creator: SomebodyUnimportant
